sentences.sentence: First, gather your dry ingredients.

sentences.sentence: Once the timer goes off, take the tray out and let the cookies cool completely.

sentences.sentence: The newest paintings hang in this room.

sentences.sentence: Free guided tours begin automatically every afternoon.
